mapper.insert: insert into lego_kb_chunks (id, document_id, collection_id, chunk_index, content, embedding_text, metadata, embedding_vec, created_at) values (#{id}, #{documentId}, #{collectionId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{content}, #{embeddingText}, CAST(#{metadataJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{embeddingVecLiteral} AS vector), now())
mapper.select: select id, document_id, content, (1 - (embedding_vec <=> CAST(#{queryVecLiteral} AS vector)))::float8 as similarity from lego_kb_chunks where collection_id in #{cid} and embedding_vec is not null order by embedding_vec <=> CAST(#{queryVecLiteral} AS vector) asc limit #{limit}

select id, document_id, content, ts_rank_cd(content_tsv, plainto_tsquery('simple', #{query}))::float8 as similarity from lego_kb_chunks where collection_id in #{cid} and content_tsv @@ plainto_tsquery('simple', #{query}) order by similarity desc limit #{limit}
